productDisplayName: Lotto Men Atlantica Black Sports Shoe
description: Designed for the runners who never compromise on style and comfort, the Atlantica running shoe from lotto comes with a durable synthetic upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you safe and stable on various surfaces. Upper Heavily meshed upper with startegically placed synthetic overlays for breathable comfort and enhanced shoe structure Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Meshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfort and snug fit Cushioned footbed for shock absorption Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and traction Punto Flex grooves on the forefoot for easy movement Scooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the back foot Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
